title: The Souler Opposite
review_summary: The reviewer finds this movie hilariously original, with excellent performances and poignant themes of love overcoming adversity; they praise Chris Meloni's Oscar-worthy acting but wish for continued collaboration among cast members.

title: Reckless
review_summary: The reviewer enjoyed this mini-series despite its occasional genre bending; Robson Greene's portrayal of passionate love was particularly praised while suggesting it may benefit from being shortened to just one or two longer installments. A follow-up series is anticipated on Netflix soon.
